arguments.task: Research Salesforce using official first-party sources only. Open and extract evidence from Salesforce developer docs and official pages for: 1) authentication methods for APIs, 2) whether APIs are REST, GraphQL, or both and breadth of API surface, 3) self-serve access and pricing/access gating for developers, including whether a free or trial environment exists, 4) rate limits or API limits notes, 5) whether an official or clearly existing MCP server/integration exists from Salesforce or in Salesforce official ecosystem pages. Also inspect official docs/support/pricing/release pages as needed. Return a concise evidence-backed summary with exact URLs visited.

input.thought: Start a browser run on official Salesforce sources to collect evidence for API/auth/access/MCP buildability.
